name: Churu Cat Treats Tuna Variety 20 Tubes
shortDescription: Churu Cat Lickable Treats Tuna Variety 20ct creamy, low-calorie cat treats made with real tuna, chicken, scallop, and salmon. 91% moisture, grain-free, with added taurine for hydration and health.
description: Treat your cat to the delicious taste of the sea with the Churu Tuna Variety Pack . These creamy, lickable purée tubes are made with real tuna and high-quality ingredients , delivering irresistible flavor while keeping your feline hydrated and healthy. With 91% moisture and only 6 calories per tube , Churu treats are a low-calorie way to reward your cat, encourage hydration, and make bonding time extra special. Why Cats Love Churu: High Moisture for Hydration: Helps keep cats hydrated, especially picky drinkers Low-Calorie Treat: Only 6 kcal per tube, perfect for weight-conscious feeding Clean Ingredients: Free from grains, preservatives, artificial colors, and carrageenan Added Taurine & Vitamin E: Supports heart, vision, and immune health Interactive Feeding: Ideal for hand-feeding, food toppers, or hiding medication Tuna Variety Includes (20 Tubes): Tuna ×5 Tuna with Chicken ×5 Tuna with Scallop ×5 Tuna with Salmon ×5 Perfect for cats of all life stages , from kittens to seniors, this pack keeps treat time fun, flavorful, and nutritious. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Taurine (min): 0.025% Calorie Content: 430 kcal/kg | 6.0 kcal per tube (ME) Net Weight: 10.0 oz (0.5 oz × 20 tubes) Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide fresh water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible.
